name: Don't Starve Together
description: Fight, Farm, Build and Explore Together in the standalone multiplayer expansion to the uncompromising wilderness survival game, Don't Starve.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows Vista/Windows 7/Windows 8
  • Processor: 1.7+ GHz or better
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Radeon HD5450 or better; 256 MB or higher
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
  • Sound Card: 100% DirectX9.0c compatible sound card and drivers
comment1: My friend bought the game for me. It's the perfect game for multiple players and it's a lot of fun. Can't believe I have played it for more than 1000 hours , still feel new to me.
comment2: This game has several modes that can be accessed to make the gameplay either easier or more challenging. I once played it with three of my friends, and it was very difficult when we first tried it because of the game mechanics and each character’s different skills. Every player has their own role, which makes the game very fun to play as a co-op game. Highly recommended for co-op gameplay.
comment3: its a great game and its even better with friends, soo... anyone wants to play with me (EU servers)
